title: Pholidia forrestii
intro: Pholidia forrestii, also known as the Pholidia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Pholidia forrestii include limonoids, flavonoids, and coumarins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
